nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficiently innovative or too generic
nodes.grounding_span: I'll first tell AI the general outline for the project I have in my head and ask the model to identify any gaps and expand on my outline

nodes.label: AI as proofreading assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or introducing errors
nodes.grounding_span: sent my finished text back to be polished and placed into the outline

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I'm definitely in charge of all of the creative decisions

nodes.label: AI as companion in solitary work
nodes.grounding_span: I find the AI assistant incredibly valuable for bouncing ideas off of and for really having something to talk through roadblocks with

nodes.label: AI's impact on writing job roles
nodes.grounding_span: AI assistants are going to make jobs like mine completely obsolete

nodes.label: AI's ability to produce human-like text
nodes.label_negative: AI's inability to produce genuinely human text
nodes.grounding_span: People can spot AI because it isn't capable of adding that distinctly human element to the text

nodes.label: Personal fulfillment through creative engagement
nodes.grounding_span: I love writing and it is really my passion

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It really speeds up the entire process

nodes.label: Authentic and quality writing
nodes.grounding_span: writing needs a human element to really connect with readers

nodes.label: Positive appreciation of AI for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It really speeds up the entire process

nodes.label: Concern about AI making writing jobs obsolete
nodes.grounding_span: AI assistants are going to make jobs like mine completely obsolete

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: It will take some of the fun and creativity out of my job

nodes.label: Confidence in ability to adapt to AI-driven roles
nodes.grounding_span: I hope I will be able to transition into one of those new editing and prompting roles easily

nodes.label: Belief in irreplaceable human element in writing
nodes.grounding_span: People can spot AI because it isn't capable of adding that distinctly human element to the text

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I would realize the next section of the outline was too broad or too deeply technical, and I would issue the corrections to the model

nodes.label: Maintaining creative ownership — drives project and identifies when outline no longer fits purpose
nodes.grounding_span: I have to be the one driving the project and identifying when the outline no longer fits my purpose
